description: Fully remove Owner Scope from Pibo's active product model, schemas, APIs, CLI/TUI, automation, workflows, tests, and current docs. The Ralph loop must work and validate only inside its Docker worker using isolated test databases; Production data migration and PR creation are final manual review-gated steps, not autonomous loop actions.

userStories.title: Establish final owner-scope removal baseline and progress tracking
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want an implementation baseline and progress record so that the Ralph loop can remove Owner Scope across the app without losing traceability.
acceptanceCriteria: Create or update IMPLEMENTATION_PROGRESS.md with branch, worktree, Docker worker, PRD paths, current status, and story progress
Link the plan, PRD, inventory summary, and raw inventory files

Record baseline rg counts for ownerScope, owner_scope, OwnerScope, owner-scope, shared:app, principalId, principal_id, room_members, listOwned, getOwned, requireOwned, personal target, active owner, and --owner-scope
Record read-only SQLite schema/column inventory for reachable affected stores without mutating data
Record Docker-only execution boundaries: runtime, deploy, gateway restart, CLI data commands, and DB mutation must use the Docker worker and isolated PIBO_HOME only
Create or verify a fresh ownerless Docker test PIBO_HOME separate from the copied migration sandbox
Run baseline npm run typecheck and npm run build, and record results
Do not change runtime behavior in this story
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-06-01 in Docker worker pibo-dev-final-owner-scope-removal-ralph. Added docs/reports/final-owner-scope-removal-baseline-2026-06-01.md with baseline rg-compatible counts using node_modules/@vscode/ripgrep-linux-x64/bin/rg -F, active source/docs scope counts, and full worktree counts. Read-only SQLite schema inventory used Python sqlite3 URI mode=ro against the copied migration sandbox; fresh test home /workspace/.pibo/ralph-test-home was verified separate and empty of SQLite DBs. Validation passed inside Docker with PIBO_HOME=/workspace/.pibo/ralph-test-home: npm run typecheck and npm run build. No runtime behavior changes; host /root/.pibo and host gateways were not touched.

userStories.title: Add strict owner-scope search gates with temporary allowlist
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want automated gates for Owner Scope vocabulary so that new work cannot reintroduce product ownership artifacts.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a test or script that fails on active product matches for ownerScope, owner_scope, OwnerScope, owner-scope, shared:app, principalId, principal_id, room_members, listOwned, getOwned, and requireOwned
Support a narrow temporary allowlist for the final migration module and historical docs only
Document how to run the gate and how to shrink the allowlist to zero after cutover
Add focused tests for the gate behavior
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-06-01. Added npm script check:product-vocab backed by scripts/legacy-product-vocabulary-gate.mjs. The gate scans active product roots (src, packages, scripts, skills, test, docs/project, docs/specs, docs/plans) for the US-002 required terms and the broader final-removal vocabulary. The built-in temporary allowlist is limited to docs/legacy/** and the isolated final app-space cutover migration path. Documented usage and post-cutover allowlist shrink policy in docs/reports/final-owner-scope-search-gate-us-002.md and script --help. Added focused tests in test/legacy-product-vocabulary-gate.test.mjs for clean pass, active failures, multiple required spellings, historical-doc allowlisting, current-doc rejection, and isolated cutover migration allowlisting. Docker validation passed with PIBO_HOME=/workspace/.pibo/ralph-test-home: node --test test/legacy-product-vocabulary-gate.test.mjs and npm run typecheck. A Docker scan summary of the current branch reported 3703 expected failures and 0 allowed matches across 1019 files because later removal stories have not yet removed active Owner Scope artifacts; this is not wired into npm test yet.

userStories.title: Replace shared-app legacy owner helpers with neutral app context
userStories.description: As an allowed Pibo user, I want the shared app context to be represented without a synthetic Owner Scope so that shared:app is not a product owner value.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove LEGACY_SHARED_APP_OWNER_SCOPE and getSharedAppLegacyOwnerScope from active runtime code
Keep a neutral app context representation that has no legacyOwnerScope or ownerScope field
Update imports and callers to stop requesting a replacement owner value
Focused tests cover neutral app context creation and absence of legacy owner fields
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-06-01. Replaced src/shared-app.ts with a neutral app-context-only module: PiboSharedAppContext now has only kind and id, SHARED_APP_CONTEXT has no legacyOwnerScope/ownerScope, and the removed exports LEGACY_SHARED_APP_OWNER_SCOPE/getSharedAppLegacyOwnerScope no longer exist in src/packages/scripts/test. Existing pre-cutover schemas still require temporary owner_scope/principal_id write values until later schema-removal stories, so unavoidable legacy storage compatibility was isolated in src/owner-scope-compat.ts with explicit deletion guidance; later stories must remove those callers rather than treating it as product context. Updated source imports away from shared-app legacy helpers, updated tests to stop importing legacy owner symbols from shared-app, and updated web-auth focused tests to prove different auth identities share the same neutral appContext with no legacy owner fields. Docker validation passed with PIBO_HOME=/workspace/.pibo/ralph-test-home: npm run typecheck; npm run build; node --test test/web-auth-shared-app-context.test.mjs; node --test test/context-build-inspector.test.mjs test/cron-store-lifecycle.test.mjs test/session-router-store.test.mjs; and rg gate for getSharedAppLegacyOwnerScope|LEGACY_SHARED_APP_OWNER_SCOPE over src packages scripts test returned no matches. Host /root/.pibo and host gateways were not touched.

userStories.title: Make web auth an access gate without product owner fields

acceptanceCriteria: Remove ownerScope from PiboWebSession and related web auth/session types

userStories.notes: Completed 2026-06-01. Removed ownerScope from PiboWebSession in src/web/types.ts and stopped requireWebSession from constructing a product owner field; it now returns only authSession plus the neutral appContext. Updated Chat Web and Context Files handlers that previously read webSession.ownerScope: unavoidable pre-cutover owner_scope storage compatibility now calls legacyOwnerScopeForPreCutoverSchemas() directly at legacy schema boundaries, while Context Files revision/change actor ids use the auth identity only as audit metadata. Focused web auth tests now assert unauthenticated requests still reject with PiboAuthError 401 and two authenticated identities receive the same ownerless app context with no ownerScope/legacyOwnerScope on either the web session or appContext. Docker validation passed with PIBO_HOME=/workspace/.pibo/ralph-test-home: npm run typecheck; npm run build; node --test test/web-auth-shared-app-context.test.mjs test/context-files-web.test.mjs; and grep over src/web src/apps/chat src/plugins plus the focused test found no webSession.ownerScope/PiboWebSession ownerScope call sites. Host /root/.pibo and host gateways were not touched.

userStories.notes: Completed 2026-06-01. Removed ownerScope from PiboRuntimeSessionContext and stopped runtime assembly from passing ownerScope through ToolDefinitionContext/toolContext. acceptanceCriteria: Remove ownerScope from PiboSession, CreatePiboSessionInput, UpdatePiboSessionInput, and FindPiboSessionsInput
Remove owner matching from in-memory and SQLite-backed session store logic

userStories.notes: Completed 2026-06-01. Removed ownerScope from PiboSession, CreatePiboSessionInput, UpdatePiboSessionInput, and FindPiboSessionsInput in src/sessions/store.ts. In-memory find matching no longer filters by owner and session creation/update no longer carries owner fields. Updated SqlitePiboSessionStore and PiboDataSessionStore to return ownerless PiboSession objects and to ignore owner as a public find/update/create contract; temporary owner_scope column write compatibility remains only at legacy schema boundaries for US-007/US-024. Updated session-router, Chat Web session creation, Ralph/Cron session creation, debug trace row mapping, and local CLI session source call sites so PiboSession is app-global and actor/session metadata no longer reads PiboSession.ownerScope. Focused tests now assert no ownerScope own property on built, stored, implicit, and derived sessions. Docker validation passed with PIBO_HOME=/workspace/.pibo/ralph-test-home: npm run typecheck; npm run build; node --test test/session-store.test.mjs test/pibo-data-session-store.test.mjs test/session-router-store.test.mjs test/workflow-session-kind.test.mjs. Docker exact search over src/sessions src/core/session-router.ts src/debug/trace.ts for ownerScope/listOwned/getOwned/requireOwned/OwnedSession returned no matches. A follow-up schema search still shows owner_scope/idx_pibo_sessions_owner only in src/sessions/sqlite-store.ts and src/sessions/pibo-data-store.ts as the expected US-007 schema-removal target. Host /root/.pibo and host gateways were not touched.

userStories.notes: Completed 2026-06-01. Updated fresh SqlitePiboSessionStore pibo_sessions schema to omit owner_scope and idx_pibo_sessions_owner, and added constructor-time table rebuild for historical pibo_sessions tables that still contain owner_scope. The rebuild copies id, pi_session_id, channel, kind, profile, parent_id, origin_id, workspace, title, metadata_json, active_model_json when present, created_at, and updated_at into an ownerless table, then drops the legacy owner index/table. PiboDataSessionStore and pibo data migrate sessions-to-v2 no longer write owner_scope values even when importing historical pibo-sessions rows. Added temp-file fixture coverage for shared:app and user:* historical rows migrating to ownerless SqlitePiboSessionStore and pibo.sqlite sessions rows while preserving ids, piSessionIds, hierarchy/origin, metadata, active model, profile, workspace, titles, and timestamps. Added schema assertions that fresh pibo-sessions.sqlite and pibo.sqlite sessions tables contain no owner_scope column or owner index. Docker validation passed with PIBO_HOME=/workspace/.pibo/ralph-test-home: npm run build; node --test test/session-store.test.mjs test/pibo-data-session-store.test.mjs test/session-model-source-of-truth.test.mjs; npm run typecheck. A targeted Docker rg gate over src/sessions/sqlite-store.ts src/sessions/pibo-data-store.ts src/data/cli.ts for fresh owner column/index creation patterns returned no matches. Migration fixtures used only temp files in the Docker worker; host /root/.pibo and host gateways were not touched. Remaining src/data/cli.ts owner_scope references are in unread-baseline repair/read-state code scheduled for Chat read-state stories, not the pibo-sessions fresh schema.
